# DiGiFaMaR

> Marketplace connecting buyers directly with local farmers — fresh produce, transparent pricing, escrow-protected orders, and live delivery tracking.

DiGiFaMaR (Digital Farmers Market) is a farm-to-table marketplace. Buyers shop produce listings from verified farms, chat with farmers, pay through an escrow that releases funds only after delivery, and track orders in real time.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of the marketplace and featured farms.
- [Market](/market): Browse current produce listings.
- [Browse](/browse): Search listings by category, farm, and location.
- [How it works](/how-it-works): Buyer and farmer journey explained.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Platform fees and escrow costs.
- [Buyer protection](/buyer-protection): Escrow, delivery guarantees, and dispute policy.
- [Lending](/lending): Working-capital lending program for farmers.
- [About](/about): Company background and mission.
- [Contact](/contact): Support email, WhatsApp, and contact form.

## Optional

- [Sign in](/signin): Account access for buyers and farmers.
- [Sign up](/signup): Create a buyer or farmer account.
